div.p: The schedule contains allegations received by the Ethics and Forensic Services department and our recommendations in respect thereof, which is submitted for your approval to be referred to the relevant line directorates in accordance with the sections 8.11.4 and 8.11.5 of the Fraud Prevention Policy and Response Plan as well as the applicable Executive Directors delegations.
These allegations are untested and the following matters are herewith forwarded to you for your consideration and approval for onward submission to the relevant line directorates:
Feel free to contact me with any related comments/queries.

The schedule contains allegations received by the Ethics and Forensic Services department and our recommendations in respect thereof, which is submitted for authorisation in terms of section 9(1) of your delegated authority as read in the City’s System of Council Delegations.
These allegations are untested and the following forensic matter is herewith forwarded to you for further consideration and authorisation.
Feel free to contact me with any related comments/queries.

As per the schedule meeting dated 3 March 2025, a request for preliminary assessment has been recommended by the Ethics and Forensic Services Recommendation Committee. These allegations are untested and a preliminary assessment is necessary to determine whether a full forensic investigation is required:
The City Manager is vested with an implied power to authorise lifestyle reviews to mitigate and detect risks associated with fraud, corruption, maladministration and / or unethical conduct.

In the annual Strategic Management Framework (SMF) it was recommended in the Finance Directorate section that lifestyle audits should be completed for all officials who are involved in SCM processes. The implementation and roll out is also tracked and monitored on the CCT Corporate Risk Register (CCTCRR) with a project end date of 31 December 2026.
Authority is hereby requested to conduct lifestyle reviews on the newly appointed SCM Managers and Heads within Supply Chain Management, Finance directorate.
Feel free to contact me with any related comments/queries.
